title: Portfolio OS 2026
description: A Windows 11-inspired operating system portfolio where visitors interact with a fully functional desktop environment. Features draggable windows, a taskbar, start menu, and multiple built-in applications.
longDescription: A groundbreaking portfolio project that reimagines the traditional developer portfolio as an interactive operating system. Built with React and Express.js, featuring a complete window management system, virtual file explorer, terminal emulator, and multiple apps — all running in the browser.
highlights: Custom window manager with drag, resize, minimize, maximize
Built-in terminal emulator with real commands
JSON-based data architecture — no database needed

title: HealthSathi AI
description: An AI-powered health companion application that provides personalized health insights, symptom analysis, and wellness recommendations using machine learning models.
longDescription: HealthSathi AI leverages cutting-edge machine learning to provide users with personalized health insights. Features include symptom analysis, diet recommendations, exercise plans, and health tracking — all presented through an intuitive, accessible interface.

title: DevCollab Platform
description: A real-time collaborative coding platform that enables developers to pair program, share code, and conduct live code reviews with integrated video chat.
longDescription: DevCollab brings the power of pair programming to the browser. With real-time code synchronization, integrated video chat, and a built-in code review system, teams can collaborate seamlessly regardless of their physical location.

title: FinTrack Dashboard
description: A personal finance tracking dashboard with data visualization, budget management, and spending analytics powered by interactive charts.
longDescription: FinTrack helps users take control of their finances with beautiful data visualizations, smart budgeting tools, and AI-powered spending insights. Features include expense categorization, recurring payment tracking, and customizable financial goals.
